records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Must stop. Must stop.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Must stop. Must stop.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Must stop. Must stop.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Stop the Administration.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Stop the Administration.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Stop the Administration.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Poor things...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Poor things...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Poor things...

records.m_Talk_ENG: The mind control forces them to run toward us, even though their bodies are frozen.
records.m_Talk_DEU: The mind control forces them to run toward us, even though their bodies are frozen.
records.m_Talk_FRA: The mind control forces them to run toward us, even though their bodies are frozen.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Yaksha Deputy Commander!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Yaksha Deputy Commander!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Yaksha Deputy Commander!

records.m_Talk_ENG: The Shadow is getting away!
records.m_Talk_DEU: The Shadow is getting away!
records.m_Talk_FRA: The Shadow is getting away!

records.m_Talk_ENG: There are just too many of the test subjects!
records.m_Talk_DEU: There are just too many of the test subjects!
records.m_Talk_FRA: There are just too many of the test subjects!

records.m_Talk_ENG: We'll take care of this place! So hurry!
records.m_Talk_DEU: We'll take care of this place! So hurry!
records.m_Talk_FRA: We'll take care of this place! So hurry!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Thanks. I leave this place to you...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Thanks. I leave this place to you...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Thanks. I leave this place to you...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_DEU: *Huff* *Huff*
records.m_Talk_FRA: *Huff* *Huff*

records.m_Talk_ENG: I didn't expect the coalition led by that damn rabbit would be so powerful!
records.m_Talk_DEU: I didn't expect the coalition led by that damn rabbit would be so powerful!
records.m_Talk_FRA: I didn't expect the coalition led by that damn rabbit would be so powerful!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Without Chief Conductor...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Without Chief Conductor...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Without Chief Conductor...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Hmm?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Hmm?

records.m_Talk_ENG: That's as far as you go...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That's as far as you go...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That's as far as you go...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kyaah...?!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kyaah...?!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kyaah...?!

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, kill me now if you're going to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, kill me now if you're going to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, kill me now if you're going to.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I'm sorry, but that will be difficult. My abilities take some time.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I'm sorry, but that will be difficult. My abilities take some time.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I'm sorry, but that will be difficult. My abilities take some time.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Don't worry. I'll make sure you feel every bit of pain while slowly savoring it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Don't worry. I'll make sure you feel every bit of pain while slowly savoring it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Don't worry. I'll make sure you feel every bit of pain while slowly savoring it.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, you damn rabbit!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, you damn rabbit!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, you damn rabbit!

records.m_Talk_ENG: And you don't even know what happened to your Commander...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: And you don't even know what happened to your Commander...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: And you don't even know what happened to your Commander...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...What?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...What?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...What?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Oh, seeing that expression on your face explains everything.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Oh, seeing that expression on your face explains everything.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Oh, seeing that expression on your face explains everything.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Why the Administration suddenly entered these variable depth coordinates.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Why the Administration suddenly entered these variable depth coordinates.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Why the Administration suddenly entered these variable depth coordinates.

records.m_Talk_ENG:
But unlucky for you, that lion is
8g
records.m_Talk_DEU:
But unlucky for you, that lion is
8g
records.m_Talk_FRA:
But unlucky for you, that lion is
8g

records.m_Talk_ENG: That sound...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: That sound...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: That sound...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You came, Chief Conductor.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You came, Chief Conductor.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You came, Chief Conductor.

records.m_Talk_ENG: It seems our VIP has quite the hearing.
records.m_Talk_DEU: It seems our VIP has quite the hearing.
records.m_Talk_FRA: It seems our VIP has quite the hearing.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But to ruin the stage and instruments I put so much effort into...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But to ruin the stage and instruments I put so much effort into...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But to ruin the stage and instruments I put so much effort into...

records.m_Talk_ENG: I am not sure who to send the bill to.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I am not sure who to send the bill to.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I am not sure who to send the bill to.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Descendant of Bygones.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Descendant of Bygones.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Descendant of Bygones.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Kgh, Maestra...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Kgh, Maestra...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Kgh, Maestra...!
